hero.title: Pawsome Days at K9 Leisure Club Doggy Day Care
hero.intro: Your Dog's Home Away from Home in Kidderminster

sections.title: Your Dog's Home Away from Home in Kidderminster
paragraphs: Leaving your furry best friend while you're at work or out and about can be ruff! But don't worry, K9 Leisure Club is here to the rescue!
Our dog nursery and daycare centre in Kidderminster is the pawfect place for your pup to play, socialise, and have a tail-waggin' good time while you're away.

sections.title: A Day Filled with Fun and Friends
paragraphs: At K9 Leisure Club, we believe in making every day an adventure! Our spacious indoor and outdoor play areas are designed to keep your dog happy, active, and entertained.
bullets: Playtime Galore: Zoom around with new friends, chase balls, and enjoy exciting games.
One-on-one attention: We offer dedicated one-on-one sessions for pups who prefer personalised playtime.
Rest and Relaxation: For chilled-out moments, we have cosy guest areas for naps and downtime.

sections.title: Half-Day Adventures
paragraphs: Want to give your dog a taste of the fun? We offer half-day daycare sessions!
Please stick to agreed drop-off and pick-up times to ensure a smooth and safe experience for everyone.

sections.title: Safety First, Fun Always
paragraphs: Our top priority is the safety and well-being of your furry friend. Our team is made up of dog-loving professionals who are trained in dog behaviour and first aid.
bullets: Supervised Play: We keep a watchful eye on all furry guests.
Clean and Comfy: Our facility is kept sparkling clean and climate-controlled.
Peace of Mind: We provide a safe and nurturing environment where your dog can thrive.

sections.title: Opening Times and Prices
paragraphs: Full Day Doggy Daycare - Monday to Friday, 7:30am to 6:00pm - GBP 30
Half Day Doggy Daycare - Monday to Friday, 7:30am to 12:30pm or 1:00pm to 6:00pm - GBP 20
Discounts: 10% discount for 5 bookings, 15% discount for 10 bookings, and 50% discount for each additional dog.

sections.title: Important Information
paragraphs: Your pooch is required to attend a free 2 hour assessment prior to your first booking so we can assess their needs and confirm daycare suitability.
Please download and return registration, consent, and acceptance forms before booking.
For safety and prevention of infectious diseases, we require evidence that inoculations (including boosters) are up to date and worming has been completed within three months.
